internalNotes: Acme is a healthy account overall, but their integration developers frequently encounter gateway timeouts. Tech lead mentions they are pushing the API limits.
salesUpdates: Contract renewal is coming up in October. They have expressed interest in adding the Advanced AI Analytics add-on (+$2k/month).
customerFeedback: Loves the performance improvements, but complains about timeout errors during peak sync hours.

internalNotes: Globex is feeling some friction with report exports. They have a compliance audit coming up, so this is high stakes for them.
salesUpdates: Potential upsell to Enterprise if compliance reporting is resolved and automated.
customerFeedback: Exporting CSV/PDF compliance lists is confusing and sometimes fails.

internalNotes: Initech is currently blocked by SSO issues. They had planned to go live today. Engineering is on the phone with their IT admin.
salesUpdates: Expansion deals for Initech's European division are currently paused until SSO is stable.
customerFeedback: SSO login failure is delaying our entire product rollout. Need this resolved ASAP.

internalNotes: Umbrella Corp is highly satisfied since we delivered the security documentation. Emily is keeping a close eye on their transition.
salesUpdates: No immediate upsell opportunities, but contract is secure.
customerFeedback: Emily Watson has been exceptionally helpful in addressing our security team's inquiries.

internalNotes: Hooli is scaling up seat counts rapidly. They are moving to fully automate their user onboarding via our SCIM API.
salesUpdates: Already on Enterprise plan, but volume pricing discussions for 1,000+ seats are active.
customerFeedback: We need better developer documentation for the user invitation endpoints.

internalNotes: Soylent Logistics has low usage scores. The account is at risk of churning as the driver team finds the web portal too complex.
salesUpdates: At risk of downgrade/churn. Account manager needs to schedule a training session.
customerFeedback: The mobile navigation is too cluttered. Drivers are reverting to paper logs.

internalNotes: Veerdyne is building a custom BI dashboard integration. They are running into formatting issues with CSV headers.
salesUpdates: Evaluating high-volume API addon package ($500/month) if custom dashboard works.
customerFeedback: CSV importer needs clearer documentation on timestamp formats.

internalNotes: Tyrell Corp is in a critical state. Their production pipeline is broken due to webhook failures. High churn threat if not resolved today.
salesUpdates: Renewals are frozen until SLA is restored. Customer demands SLA credits.
customerFeedback: Our robotic assembly lines are stalling due to webhook delays. This is causing significant financial losses.

internalNotes: Cyberdyne is a pending customer. Sandbox testing was highly successful, waiting on contract execution.
salesUpdates: Negotiations are 95% complete. Final sign-off from legal pending next week.
customerFeedback: The sandbox environment was extremely intuitive. We look forward to starting production.

internalNotes: Wayne Enterprises is our largest account. They love the customized reporting features and have high engagement.
salesUpdates: Looking to lock them into a multi-year enterprise contract with custom SLA terms in Q4.
customerFeedback: The performance of the reporting dashboard is exceptional. Major timesaver.

internalNotes: Stark Industries is heavily using our API. They request minor formatting fixes to audit logs.
salesUpdates: Stable account. Stark is interested in a co-marketing case study regarding their clean energy analytics portal.
customerFeedback: Excellent dashboard, but please add IP address headers to the security log exports.

internalNotes: Oscorp is in onboarding phase. Sandbox setup is delayed because their dev team hasn't responded to instructions.
salesUpdates: Account manager is calling the project sponsor to expedite sandbox testing.
customerFeedback: We are resource-constrained this week, will set up the dev workspace next Monday.

internalNotes: Dunder Mifflin is showing sign of churn. They find the Basic tier too restrictive, and MRR is low.
salesUpdates: High churn risk. AM has offered a 15% discount on the Growth tier to help them scale.
customerFeedback: Our team size is small, and the Basic limits are too low. We might look for cheaper alternatives.

internalNotes: Initrode is consulting client. Stable account, regular usage by their dashboard template managers.
salesUpdates: Opportunity to upgrade to Enterprise if they want cross-client workspace sharing.
customerFeedback: Can we share customized dashboard views across different client accounts?

internalNotes: Aperture is highly frustrated with API key rotation errors on the developer panel. Compliance deadline is today.
salesUpdates: Critical account. If compliance is missed, they may cancel the contract.
customerFeedback: API key rotation is broken on our dashboard. This is blocking our security audit today.

internalNotes: MomCorp is a high-MRR account. Recently purchased 100 extra seat licenses, which have been successfully assigned.
salesUpdates: Upgrade finalized (+3,500 MRR). Onboarding for the new users is complete.
customerFeedback: The license allocation screen is very straightforward. Thanks for the quick upgrade.

internalNotes: Reynholm is a small account. They complain about overage fees for API limits.
salesUpdates: AM offered a custom API package to prevent further billing overage complaints.
customerFeedback: Why were we charged $50 for exceeding API queries? The warnings should be more prominent.

internalNotes: Selleck Cosmetics is highly engaged. Marketing team is very active.
salesUpdates: Active referral champion. Selleck is willing to refer two partner brands to us.
customerFeedback: The dashboard layout and campaign widgets are gorgeous and easy to navigate.

internalNotes: Massive Dynamic is running into performance bottlenecks on massive 90-day exports.
salesUpdates: High potential for upsell to high-performance dedicated database cluster (+$5k/month).
customerFeedback: Downloading reports spanning 90 days causes the dashboard page to crash.

internalNotes: Gekko & Co is facing card payment issues. Account is active but billing dashboard issues need dev support.
salesUpdates: AM is working with finance to process wire transfers as a backup for this month.
customerFeedback: The credit card renewal form is rejecting our corporate card repeatedly.
